content: Perceived performance for dashboard SaaS: skeleton screens feel ~20% faster than spinners for identical waits; combined with progressive/prioritized loading users report ~30% faster experiences. Stale-while-revalidate (serve cached data instantly, refresh in background) is the standard pattern for KPI dashboards. Optimistic UI (apply change immediately, reconcile with server, roll back on failure) gives large perceived-speed gains for low effort on high-frequency actions. Perceived-performance design closes gaps infrastructure optimization cannot.
